pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the source/target properties are not updated to match the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may fail to compile code targeting JDK 21 or lack support for new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to process annotations or compile on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.
